rationale: Educ. Code §21.003 governs certification requirements for school district employees. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A person may not be employed as a teacher, teacher intern or teacher trainee, librarian, educational aide, administrator, educational diagnostician, or school counselor by a school district unless the person holds an appropriate certificate or permit issued as provided by Subchapter B.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and educator certification requirements.
